questions.question: In the prisoner's dilemma game, what is the best response for a rational prisoner when the other prisoner chooses to confess?
questions.hint: A brief explanation of the dilemma

questions.question: An alternative to the standard prisoner's dilemma game, where cooperation is rewarded, is known as the _______.
questions.hint: A brief description of the alternative

questions.question: Which of the following is a consequence of the prisoner's dilemma game where both prisoners choose not to cooperate with each other?
options: Both prisoners receive a lighter sentence.
Both prisoners receive a harsher sentence.
The sentence received by each prisoner depends on the strategy chosen
The sentence received by each prisoner is the same
questions.hint: A brief explanation of the consequences
